title: Arms and Valor
description: This is my first mod, please respect the time it takes as I am still learning.
body:
The mod adds for now only a custom scythe and a custom enchantment that gives the wither effect,
it also has Amytium ore and an Amythium warhammer, making it a bit more fun then before, the mod is still a work in progress so expect the the description to change as the mod gets updated, if you wanna see the mod get updated I'll be happy to keep updating it, this might be used in a roleplay server that I am admin in.

The mod is server-side, so you wouldnt be able to use the scythe on a server without the mod installed.

It has compatibillity with BackSlot too!

Last edited on 05/26/2025.
